display.purpose: Hero title only. Uppercase, 2px tracking in Latin. RTL: Reem Kufi, line-height 1.3, zero tracking.

body.purpose: Work Sans on LTR, Tajawal on RTL. Soft Ink minimum contrast on light ground.

label.purpose: Reem Kufi section kickers in Brass Gold — the deliberate cross-script accent.

shadows.name: ribbon
shadows.purpose: Hanging ribbon pennants only — nothing else casts.

shadows.name: crest-glow
shadows.purpose: Golden halo behind the hero crest.

motion.name: state-shift
motion.purpose: Button and link hover transitions (background, filter, color).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Damask Maroon pill — the visit/directions CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.36 0.13 22); color: oklch(0.98 0.01 75); padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 100px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.28 0.12 22); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.74 0.13 78); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Brass Gold pill — hero emphasis CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.74 0.13 78); color: oklch(0.22 0.02 40); padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 100px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; transition: filter 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.36 0.13 22); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Transparent pill with 1.5px border — secondary action on light ground.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.36 0.13 22); padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 100px; border: 1.5px solid oklch(0.36 0.13 22); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.02 70); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.74 0.13 78); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Language Switcher
components.description: Segmented EN/عربي pill; active segment fills Brass Gold.
components.html: ENعربي
components.css: .ds-lang { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(0.95 0.02 70); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.02 60); border-radius: 100px; padding: 3px; gap: 2px; } .ds-lang-opt { padding: 6px 13px; border-radius: 100px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.42 0.02 40); line-height: 1; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-lang-ar { font-family: 'Reem Kufi', sans-serif; padding-top: 8px; padding-bottom: 4px; } .ds-lang-opt:hover { color: oklch(0.36 0.13 22); } .ds-lang-opt.ds-active { background: oklch(0.74 0.13 78); color: oklch(0.22 0.02 40); }

components.name: Allergen Chip
components.description: Pastel dietary tag with leading color dot.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 100px; background: oklch(0.93 0.03 300); color: oklch(0.4 0.09 300); } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.4 0.09 300); }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Reem Kufi kicker in Brass Gold over a Cormorant headline in Damask Maroon.
components.html:
Our Menu

A taste of what awaits
components.css: .ds-sect { text-align: center; } .ds-kicker { font-family: 'Reem Kufi', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.74 0.13 78); font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-headline { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(30px, 4vw, 42px); color: oklch(0.36 0.13 22); margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Review Card
components.description: Flat testimonial card — gold stars, quote, attribution. No shadow.
components.html:
★★★★★

"The ice cream and baklava combo here is amazing, would 100% recommend."

Mimi · Google review
components.css: .ds-review { background: oklch(0.975 0.012 75); border-radius: 14px; padding: 26px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.02 60); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; max-width: 340px; } .ds-stars { color: oklch(0.74 0.13 78); font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 2px; } .ds-review-quote { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.42 0.02 40); margin: 0; } .ds-review-who { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.22 0.02 40); } .ds-review-who span { font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.42 0.02 40); }

components.name: Damascus Ribbon
components.description: The signature hanging pennant — maroon gradient, gold-bordered diamond, the only shadowed element.
components.html:
♛
Welcome
TO THE
King Of Sweets
components.css: .ds-ribbon { width: 140px; clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 82%, 50% 100%, 0 82%); background: linear-gradient(165deg, oklch(0.36 0.13 22), oklch(0.28 0.12 22)); box-shadow: 0 14px 32px oklch(0.22 0.02 40 / 0.6); padding: 20px 12px 40px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 16px; text-align: center; } .ds-ribbon-diamond { width: 64px; height: 64px; transform: rotate(45deg); border-radius: 10px; border: 3px solid oklch(0.74 0.13 78); background: oklch(0.98 0.01 75); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-ribbon-crown { transform: rotate(-45deg); font-size: 26px; color: oklch(0.74 0.13 78); } .ds-ribbon-big { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 22px; color: oklch(0.74 0.13 78); line-height: 1; } .ds-ribbon-mid { font-family: 'Work Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: oklch(0.98 0.01 75 / 0.8); } .ds-ribbon-small { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; color: oklch(0.98 0.01 75); }

narrative.overview: The maroon welcome ribbons hanging down the page are the system's organizing idea: heritage unfurled from Damascus to Westgate Road. Everything else behaves like the shop around them — a warm, flat counter surface where golden trays and real photographs carry the abundance, and the ribbon is the one element allowed to hang over the page, casting the only true shadows. The system is generous, proud and bustling: full-bleed photography of piled-high trays, pill buttons you can't miss, and two scripts — Latin and Arabic — treated as equal citizens.
keyCharacteristics: Two-voice palette: Brass Gold accents on Damask Maroon commitments, on a warm flat ground
Serif display (Cormorant Garamond) over workhorse sans (Work Sans); Reem Kufi + Tajawal own the Arabic page
Flat tone-on-tone surfaces; shadows reserved for hanging elements
Real photography everywhere — the counter, the owner, the storefront
Fully mirrored RTL experience at /ar/ — layout, gradients and type all flip deliberately

rules.name: The Two-Thread Rule
rules.body: Brass Gold and Damask Maroon are the only two brand voices. New UI never introduces a third saturated color; if something needs emphasis, it gets gold, maroon, or scale — not a new hue.

rules.name: The Ribbon Wears Both
rules.body: Wherever the ribbon appears, gold sits on maroon. That pairing is the brand signature; don't dilute it.

rules.name: The Two-Script Rule
rules.body: Arabic is never an afterthought: html[dir='rtl'] swaps the font variables and zeroes ALL letter-spacing. Any new component must be designed against both directions before it ships.

rules.name: The Hanging Ribbon Rule
rules.body: If it doesn't hang, it doesn't cast. Adding a shadow to a card, button, or input is prohibited; use tone, border, or scale instead.

dos: Do keep body text at ≥4.5:1 — Soft Ink is the lightest allowed body color on Counter White.
Do design every new component in both directions; use logical properties so RTL mirrors for free.
Do use real photography of the actual shop — one decisive photo beats five generic ones.
Do separate sections by tone, never by shadow.
Do keep gold-on-maroon as the ribbon's signature pairing.
donts: Don't build anything that reads as a takeaway listing site — no price-grid menu tables, no transactional density.
Don't drift toward the sterile luxury patisserie — no white-marble minimalism, no whisper-quiet spacing.
Don't introduce a third saturated hue — the Two-Thread Rule stands.
Don't add shadows to cards, buttons, or inputs — flat counter, hanging ribbons.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, or glassmorphism panels.
Don't replace photography with colored blocks or decorative 'oriental' patterns — heritage is a person, not a pattern.
